title: Otis Eats Yum Yum
synopsis: Little Otis explores different foods and makes delightful sounds with each bite. From crunchy apples to squishy bananas, each page features a new food and its special sound, creating a rhythmic pattern that babies can predict and enjoy.

pages.text: Otis is hungry! Time to eat!

illustration.description: A cheerful toddler boy named Otis with warm brown skin, dark curly hair, and bright eyes sits in a sunny yellow high chair. He wears a soft blue bib with a smiling sun pattern. His arms are raised excitedly toward a colorful plate. The kitchen background shows soft pastel green walls with simple shapes.
illustration.alt: Happy toddler Otis in high chair ready to eat

illustration.description: Otis holds a bright red apple slice in both small hands, taking a big bite with his mouth wide open. His eyes are squeezed shut with joy. Apple juice drips down his chin. The background is soft cream with gentle pink circles floating around him.
illustration.alt: Otis biting into a crunchy red apple

illustration.description: Otis squeezes a ripe yellow banana piece between his fingers, making it squish out the sides. His expression shows wonder and delight. Banana mush covers his hands and face. The background features soft yellow swirls and white puffy cloud shapes.
illustration.alt: Otis squishing a soft yellow banana

illustration.description: Otis breaks a golden rectangular cracker in half, creating visible crumbs that fall onto his tray. His mouth forms a perfect 'O' of surprise at the snapping sound. The high chair tray is scattered with cracker pieces. Warm orange and beige tones fill the gentle background.

Otis tilts a small orange bowl toward his mouth, with tomato soup dripping down his chin. His eyes peek over the bowl rim with concentration. A diverse family in the blurred background shows his mama with flowing black hair and papa with glasses watching lovingly.
illustration.alt: Otis slurping soup from a small bowl

illustration.description: Otis chews on a cube of bright yellow cheese, his cheeks puffed out comically. One eyebrow raises as he concentrates on chewing. More cheese cubes sit on his tray in a neat row. The background shows soft lavender and white stripes.
illustration.alt: Otis munching on yellow cheese cubes

illustration.description: Otis presses bright green peas between his thumb and finger, making them pop out and roll across his tray. His face shows pure delight and mischief. Several peas have fallen on the floor below. The background features cheerful mint green with tiny white dots.
illustration.alt: Otis popping green peas with his fingers

pages.text: All done! Otis says yum, yum, yum!

illustration.description: Otis claps his messy hands together with food remnants on his face and bib, showing a huge toothless grin. His arms stretch wide in celebration. His diverse family - mama, papa, and big sister with braided hair - applaud behind him. The background glows with warm golden light and floating heart shapes.
illustration.alt: Happy messy Otis celebrating with his family

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What sound does the apple make?
questions.explanation: The apple goes crunch, crunch, crunch when Otis bites it!

questions.question: What does Otis use to eat soup?
questions.explanation: Otis tilts his bowl to slurp the soup!

questions.question: What does Otis say at the end?
questions.explanation: Otis says yum, yum, yum when he's all done eating!
